message:
fix(middleware): close bd-j29, remove dead code after panic!, refactor server lib

- bd-j29 (E2E Middleware Integration Tests) marked closed after
  implementation and verification
- Removed 4 unreachable expressions (Vec::new() / String::new())
  that followed panic!() calls in e2e_middleware.rs
- Refactored fastmcp-server/src/lib.rs (167+/154-): reorganized
  middleware invocation flow and error mapping

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
